ksa_text: Establish responsible AI practices and ethical frameworks, including defining organizational AI risk tolerance, ethical guidelines, and mitigation strategies aligned with governance policy.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the task contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('organizational risk tolerance'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch, not irrelevance); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
